Weekly Summary: Mumbai_City District

Week 20: (18 May 2026 - 23 May 2026)

General Administration Department

Regarding the appointment of a supplier for the provision of stationery, computer peripherals, and other supplies to the Hon. Chief Ministers Secretariat, the Office situated at the Hon. Chief Ministers Official Residence, the Ministers Establishment Desks (ME-1, 2, 3), as well as the offices of the Additional Chief Secretary/Principal Secretary/Secretary associated with the Ministers Establishment.

Districts: Mumbai

Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 12 May 2026

Home Department

To arrange for bank loans for officers and personnel of the State Police Force for the purpose of house construction.

Funds: Rs. 1768.08 crore Districts: Mumbai
202605121....pdf
Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 12 May 2026

Regarding the payment of the invoice submitted by M/s Secutech Automation India Pvt. Ltd. for the installation of CCTV cameras at the official residence Varsha.

Districts: Mumbai
202605131....pdf
Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 13 May 2026

Regarding the publication of the Final Seniority Lists as of January 1, 2024, January 1, 2025, and January 1, 2026, for Gazetted Group A and B category officers on the establishment of the Directorate of Civil Defence.

Districts: Mumbai
202605131....pdf
Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 13 May 2026

Public Health Department

Regarding the distribution of funds amounting to 60 Central share under Account Head 2210F157, Rs. 46366.00 lakhs under Item 31 and Rs. 5251.00 lakhs under Item 35 and 40 State share under Account Head 22105246, Rs. 30910.67 lakhs under Item 31 and Rs. 3500.67 lakhs under Item 35 for the general component under the centrally sponsored National Rural Health Mission through the SNA SPARSH system from the original budgetary provision for the year 2026-27.

Districts: Mumbai
202605111....pdf
Text: English
Text: Marathi
Date: 11 May 2026

Regarding the distribution of Central share 60 Account Head 2210F738, Rs. 6089.00 lakhs under Item 31 and Rs. 570.00 lakhs under Item 35 and State share 40 Account Head 2210E455, Rs. 4059.33 lakhs under Item 31 and Rs. 380.00 lakhs under Item 35 for Tribal Deployment Projects (TSP) from the budgetary provision for the financial year 2026-27 under the Centrally Sponsored National Rural Health Mission.

Skill Development and Entrepreneurship Department

Regarding the extension of temporary posts from 01/03/2026 to 31/08/2026 within the existing Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs) operating in the 43 minority-dominated areas of the Stateunder the aegis of the Directorate of Vocational Education and Training, Maharashtra State, Mumbaispecifically pertaining to the second/third shifts, as well as within the two new ITIs established in Greater Mumbai at Mandvi and Nehru Nagar (Kurla)...
